MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-13-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-13-2016 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROGER KUO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROGER KUO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SUBMITTED AN UN-SWORN DECLARATION AND HIS MOTION CONTRADICTS THE COURT RECORD. THERE IS NO BASIS TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH CAL. CIV. PROC. SECTION 473(B). THAT IS, THE DEFENDANT DID NOT (1) TIMELY MOVE THE COURT FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND THERE IS NO SATISFACTORY EXPLANATION FOR THE DELAY, (2) THERE IS NO SHOWING OF MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT, AND (3) DEFENDANT DID NOT PROPERLY FILE A PROPOSED PLEADING WITH THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT KUO, ROGER

calendar.matters:
Defendant Roger Kuo'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Samuel Gintel telephone number 323-839-4272 for Plaintiff.
Roger Kuo telephone number 415-501-0345 Defendant in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kuo did not provide notice of his intent to contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Roger Kuo's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is denied. Defendant submitted an un-sworn declaration and his motion contradicts the court record. There is no basis to set aside the default or default judgment. Defendant did not comply with Cal. Civ. Proc. Section 473(b). That is, the defendant did not (1) timely move the Court for relief from default and there is no satisfactory explanation for the delay, (2) there is no showing of mistake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect, and (3) Defendant did not properly file a proposed pleading with the court. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered; Mpa; Declaration
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT ROGER KUO'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is continued to January 13, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, on the court's own motion.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Samuel Gintel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CHRISTINA BORCHERS.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ROGER KUO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Christina Borchers sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $24,106.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,032.80
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $505.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $26,643.80
Judgment signed in open court.
